zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Vernon於大約1335年出生在英國英格蘭爾希布盧可時，他的父親Robert de Vernon11333歲，母親Annabel de Oakes18歲。他於大約1350年與Margaret Brailsford在英國爾希布盧可結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1414年12月29日享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Vernon于大约1335年出生在英国英格兰爾希布盧可时，他的父亲Robert de Vernon11333岁，母亲Annabel de Oakes18岁。他于大约1350年与Margaret Brailsford在英国爾希布盧可结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1414年12月29日享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Vernon was born about 1335, in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Vernon, was 11333 and his mother, Annabel de Oakes, was 18. He married Margaret Brailsford about 1350, in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 29 December 1414, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Vernon est né environ 1335, à Shipbrook, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Vernon, avait 11333 ans et sa mère, Annabel de Oakes, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Brailsford environ 1350, à Shipbrook, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 29 décembre 1414, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Vernon um 1335 in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Vernon 11333 und seine Mutter Annabel de Oakes 18. Er hat um 1350 in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England Margaret Brailsford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Dezember 1414 im Alter von 80 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Vernon è nato il circa 1335 nel Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Vernon, aveva 11333 anni e il suo madre, Annabel de Oakes, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Brailsford circa 1350, nel Shipbrook, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 29 dicembre 1414, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Vernonが約1335年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアシュイプブルークで生まれた時，父Robert de Vernonは11333歳，母Annabel de Oakesは18歳であった。約1350年にイギリスチェシュアイアシュイプブルークでMargaret Brailsfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1414年12月29日に80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Vernon(이)가 대략 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 시브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Vernon(은)는 11333세였고, 그의 어머니 Annabel de Oakes(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1350년 영국 체실르 시브룩에서 Margaret Brailsford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1414년 12월 29일 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Vernon nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Vernon, tinha 11333 anos e sua mãe, Annabel de Oakes, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Brailsford aproximadamente 1350, em Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de dezembro de 1414, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Vernon родился около 1335 г. в местности шипбрук, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Vernon было 11333 года, а матери, которую звали Annabel de Oakes, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Brailsford около 1350 г. в местности шипбрук, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 29 декабря 1414 г. в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Vernon nació aproximadamente 1335, en Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Vernon, tenía 11333 años y su mamá, Annabel de Oakes, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Margaret Brailsford aproximadamente 1350, en Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 29 de diciembre de 1414, a la edad de 80 años.
